description_long: This bungalow features a prominent red, cross-gabled roof with visible weathering, set atop beige wooden siding and surrounded by a low, white picket fence. The structure sits on a rectangular plot bordered by a dark, paved sidewalk and includes a front porch with columns and steps leading to the main entrance. Two leafless trees stand on either side of the house, adding a stark, seasonal atmosphere to the property. The yard is a mix of green grass and bare earth, with a walkway leading from the street to the porch. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped on the sides and fewer on the front. The overall appearance suggests a Craftsman-style bungalow, blending rustic charm with urban residential context.
description: A beige wooden bungalow with a weathered red cross-gabled roof, white picket fence, front porch, and two leafless trees on a rectangular lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, front porch with columns, and a walkway leading from the street, flanked by a leafless tree on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the cross-gabled roof structure, and both leafless trees on either side of the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, the picket fence, and the left-side tree, with less visible entry features.
description_view_3: Opposite front view showing the porch, steps, and main door, with both trees visible and the walkway leading up to the entrance.
